mapper.insert: INSERT INTO media_assets (id, trip_id, activity_id, entity_type, entity_id, url, caption, uploaded_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{entityType}, #{entityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{url}, #{caption}, #{uploadedBy,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM media_assets WHERE trip_id = #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM media_assets WHERE activity_id = #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
